title: euphorbia esula var. ararica
intro: Euphorbia esula var. ararica, also known as the tithonia or Mexican sunflower, is a variety of the desert spurge plant, which is native to Mexico. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia esula var. ararica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
